front.title: Fibre Channel Registered State Change Notification (RSCN) MIB
front.workgroup: Internet and Management Support for Storage

abstract.t: This memo defines a portion of the Management Information Base (MIB) for use with network management protocols in the Internet community. In particular, it describes managed objects for information related to the management of Fibre Channel's Registered State Change Notifications (RSCNs). [STANDARDS-TRACK]
